name: junior-rambling
cv:
Bes Krasniqi
Junior Software Engineer

Fernweh Travel (2023-present) - Associate Engineer
- Built the in-app currency converter feature (React + a small Python service).
- Took the on-call pager for a low-traffic internal tool; handled two minor incidents.
- Wrote the team's onboarding doc for the local dev setup.

Fernweh Travel (2022-2023) - Engineering Intern, converted to full-time.

Education: BSc Software Engineering, 2022.

Skills: JavaScript, React, Python, REST APIs, Git.
posting: Junior Engineer, Fernweh Travel. Join the product team building traveler-facing features. You'll own small slices end to end, pair with seniors, and grow your debugging and delivery skills. We value curiosity, clear communication, and follow-through. Stack: TypeScript/React front end, Python services. 1-3 years.
profile: Enthusiastic and genuinely involved, but buries the signal: long, winding answers with lots of context and tangents before the actual point. The STAR is usually in there somewhere - situation, task, action, result - but it takes a while to surface and wanders into unrelated detail.
